input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.1
            TITLE: front bulkhead

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.1: Front Bulkhead
F.6.1 Front Bulkhead  
The Front Bulkhead must be constructed of closed section tubing meeting F.3.2.1.a

final_answer: rule F.6.1: Front Bulkhead F.6.1 Front Bulkhead The Front Bulkhead must be constructed of closed section tubing meeting F.3.2.1.a
